def normalize_arabic(s):
    # remove tashkeel and tatweel and punctuation variations
    # unify hamza forms to alif?
    s = re.sub(r'[\u064B-\u0652\u0670\u0640]', '', s)  # remove harakat + dagger alif + tatweel
    # normalize hamza: convert alef with hamza to bare alif?
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    # remove punctuation and non-letters/digits/space
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', s, flags=re.UNICODE)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

def best_matches_for_target(target_norm, data, field='ayah_text', topn=10):
    out=[]
    for q in data:
        text=q[field]
        n=normalize_arabic(text)
        ratio=lcs_ratio(target_norm, n)
        if ratio>0:
            out.append((ratio, q))
    out.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    return out[:topn]
